_meta.description: Demo-mode JWT payload — mimics the real VALC /resource/client/login response shape so the same user-menu / DB-switcher / session code paths work in demo and prod. NOT a real signed JWT; just the decoded payload portion. The mode infrastructure (config.js + IIFE boot) hydrates window.RR_SESSION from this in demo mode in lieu of a real login round-trip. Production decodes the same shape from JWT.payload after a login POST. See RRV8/API.md auth + agent-routing section for the real contract.
_meta.source: synthetic, modeled on the staging HAR JWT shape
